title: CT16 complete all-node verification — Whole-object exact types
description: Concrete schema for the complete all-node verification of CT16 (Whole-object exact types). It requires exactly 13 successful discharge records in fixed source order from CT16.N01 through CT16.N13, one per tactic node, with each record satisfying its corresponding concrete node schema.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the complete verification of CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must equal "CT16".

nodeRecords.description: Required complete verification sequence for CT16 (Whole-object exact types); must contain exactly 13 successful discharge records, one per node from CT16.N01 through CT16.N13 in source order, each satisfying its corresponding concrete node schema.
